items.name: Fracture Survivor
items.how_to_find: From the Left Street, make your way down the path through the broken doorway then continue to the second open field. Take the path on the right and drop down inside the large broken pipe, use the Old Key on the gate and pick up the journal

items.name: Expedition 34
items.how_to_find: Found to the right of the Entrance

items.name: Expedition 35
items.how_to_find: Found next to the bridge leading to the Chromatic Ballet within the Resinveil Grove

items.name: Expedition 36
items.how_to_find: Found to the right at the base of the tree upon entering White Tree

items.name: Expedition 37
items.how_to_find: Located east to The Sunless Cliffs, requieres Esquie's ability to fly

items.name: Expedition 38
items.how_to_find: Found by a few corpses surrounded by lit lamps on a cliffside to the right of the Harverster's Hollow section

items.name: Expedition 39
items.how_to_find: In the Sadness Vale area, after picking up the Energy Tint Shard, head to the other path and climb up the ledge

items.name: Expedition 40
items.how_to_find: Exit Sirene and swim toward The Monolith, pick up the Journal in the upper left corner of the isle, next to the Merchant Granasori

items.name: Expedition 41
items.how_to_find: In the Battlefield section, go to the trenches on the right side of the Fading Woman. On the left side, you can find a small area containing the journal

items.name: Expedition 42
items.how_to_find: From the Manor Gardens, head to the upper right corner to find a new path. Follow it and take the rope down, pick up journal at the end of the path

items.name: Expedition 43
items.how_to_find: Found in an abandoned expedition camp, on an island northeast of the Coastal Cave

items.name: Expedition 44
items.how_to_find: From the Harvester's Hollow, continue ahead towards the path on the left. Past the slope on the right, you will find a corpse holding a lit lamp on the left with the Journal

items.name: Expedition 45
items.how_to_find: After defeating the Giant Sapling, head into the tunnel ahead until you reach the fork path. Take the left path and pick up Journal

items.name: Expedition 46
items.how_to_find: Found by some rubble across the arena where you fight the Chromatic Glissando

items.name: Expedition 47
items.how_to_find: Found beside a collapsed structure, near the merchant Carnovi

items.name: Expedition 49
items.how_to_find: Complete the Fading Spirit Quest to open the gate, continue up the path and make your way up to the cliff to find the journal by a set of broken stairs.

items.name: Expedition 50
items.how_to_find: From the Paintress Shrine, head down the path on the right and cross the bridge. Take the path on the left and pick up the journal

items.name: Expedition 51
items.how_to_find: From the Icebound Train Station, cross the tracks and make your way up the hill. Once you reach the top where you see the end of a train, turn right into a crack in the wall to find journal

items.name: Expedition 52
items.how_to_find: Found on a narrow path near the Gestral Doctor

items.name: Expedition 53
items.how_to_find: Found at the end of the path to the left of the Bourgeon

items.name: Expedition 54
items.how_to_find: Found on the right side of the Arena, where you fight the Chromatic Hexga

items.name: Expedition 55
items.how_to_find: From the Dancing Classes, continue down the path and up the stairs to the plaza filled with enemies. To the right, you can find the journal

items.name: Expedition 56
items.how_to_find: From the Entrance, head down the path and through the broken airship, use your grappling hook to reach the other side. Head down the path and head down on the left path. Take out the enemy and pick up the journal at the base of the statue

items.name: Expedition 57
items.how_to_find: In the Battlefield section, you can find an open area after passing through the Paint Cage. In the middle of the field, you can find the journal

items.name: Expedition 58
items.how_to_find: Found within a cutscene when playing as Lune, Sciel, and Monoco past the Left Street

items.name: Expedition 59
items.how_to_find: From the Yellow Spire Wrecks, head left into a cave to find the journal by the structure in the middle

items.name: Expedition 60
items.how_to_find: Found if you interact with the ledge on the right outside the opera house. Ask Esquie to bring an item to the surface, and you will obtain the journal

items.name: Expedition 61
items.how_to_find: From the Foggy Area, cross the bridge and go straight ahead to the lit areas on the upper portion of the field. Proceed through the cave to find journal

items.name: Expedition 62
items.how_to_find: Found at a camp to the left of the beach behind Gestral Village

items.name: Expedition 63
items.how_to_find: Found by a fork in the path in the Sanctuary Maze section near a Paint Cage

items.name: Expedition 64
items.how_to_find: Found on a camp along the path to the left of the entrance to The Meadows, you will need Esquie's swim ability to reach this area

items.name: Expedition 65
items.how_to_find: After defeating the Stalact, head into the station past Monoco's Station flag. Cross the tracks at the end of the path and turn left to find the journal

items.name: Expedition 66
items.how_to_find: Found at a camp on the fork of the path after Esquie joins your party

items.name: Expedition 67
items.how_to_find: Found by a pile of boxes after being transported past the Crumbling Path flag

items.name: Expedition 68
items.how_to_find: Go through the main path in the Coral Cave, you can find the journal lying on the ground at the path with lanterns at the beginning

items.name: Expedition 69
items.how_to_find: In the Joyful Vale section, you can find the journal behind enemies on the left path

items.name: Expedition 70
items.how_to_find: From the Tainted Lumiere, head down to the main square and follow the path behind the statue. Grapple across the next area and continue making your way through the broken streets. At the fork of the road, head straight and go behind the flower stalls on the right. Take the right turn, grapple across through the floating islands, take out the enemies and get behind the building to pick up the journal

items.name: Expedition 78
items.how_to_find: From the Entrance, head down the path and take the top up on the right. Once you reach the top, you can find the journal on the right

items.name: Expedition 81
items.how_to_find: Picked up during a cutscene when Lune and Gustave find Jar for the first time

items.name: Expedition 84
items.how_to_find: Requires Esquie's fly ability to reach the location. Can be found on the path to the right of the fountain

items.name: Julie Search and Rescue
items.how_to_find: Found beside a collapsed tent, west of the Forgotten Battlefield. To reach this area, you’ll need to progress the story far enough to Fly

items.name: Simon
items.how_to_find: Found in the middle of the area after defeating Simon

items.name: Aline
items.how_to_find: Enter The Manor from the entrance in the Tainted Battlefield in The Monolith to reach the Garden, the journal can be found by the statue in the center

items.name: Renoir
items.how_to_find: Enter The Manor from the entrance in Old Lumiere, and exit the bathroom to a bedroom. The Journal can be found on the nightstand

items.name: Unkown 1
items.how_to_find: Found inside a bedroom in The Manor, which can be accessed from the Visages

items.name: Unkown 2
items.how_to_find: Found inside a room in The Manor, which can be accessed from The Reacher

items.name: Unkown 3
items.how_to_find: Place the Manor Family Canvas quest item on the empty frame in The Manor to unlock the Painting Room. There's an empty frame just by the stairs on the east wing of the manor, near the flag

items.name: Verso
items.how_to_find: Located just by the foot of a destroyed building west to Stone Quarry. Requires Esquie's swim ability and destroy coral reefs to reach it, or his Fly ability
